ddls:
CREATE TABLE "oceanographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform from which data is collected */,
  "argos_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID assigned to the Argos system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude where the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude where the data was collected */,
  "depth_level0" REAL /* Depth level 0 in meters */,
  "wspe_model_level0" REAL /* Wind speed model level 0 in meters/second */,
  "wspn_model_level0" REAL /* Wind speed normal model level 0 in meters/second */,
  "wste_model_level0" REAL /* Water stress estimation model level 0 in newton/m² */,
  "wstn_model_level0" REAL /* Water stress normal model level 0 in newton/m² */,
  "temp_level1" REAL /* Temperature at level 1 in degrees Celsius */,
  "depth_level1" INTEGER /* Depth level 1 in meters */,
  "current_test_level2" INTEGER /* Current test level 2 (none) */,
  "depth_level2" REAL /* Depth level 2 in meters */,
  "ewct_level2" REAL /* East-West current test level 2 in meters/second */,
  "nsct_level2" REAL /* North-South current test level 2 in meters/second */,
  "qc" TEXT /* Quality control flag */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor used for data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Estimated accuracy of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability score of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of data collection */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water at the collection point */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the water at the collection point */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity of the water at the collection point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oceanographic_data_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oceanographic_data_argos_id FOREIGN KEY ("argos_id") REFERENCES argos_system ("argos_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the research platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., buoy, ship, float) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was deployed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the platform */,
  "platform_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the platform is deployed */,
  "platform_status" TEXT /* Current status of the platform */,
  "platform_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the platform */,
  "platform_owner" TEXT /* Organization or individual owning the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platforms_platform_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "argos_system" (
  "argos_id" INTEGER /* Unique Argos identifier for each tracking device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Argos device */,
  "argos_status" TEXT /* Current status of the Argos device */,
  "argos_last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the Argos device */,
  "argos_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the Argos device */,
  "argos_battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the Argos device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("argos_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated data entry */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Quality control status (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qc_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the quality control process */,
  "qc_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the quality control */,
  "qc_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality control was performed */,
  "qc_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality control */,
  "qc_version" TEXT /* Version of the quality control process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES oceanographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_qc_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("qc_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depths" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth level */,
  "depth_value" REAL /* Depth value in meters */,
  "depth_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the depth measurement */,
  "depth_source" TEXT /* Source of the depth measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature entry */,
  "depth_level" REAL /* Reference to the depth level */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius at this depth */,
  "temp_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the temperature measurement */,
  "temp_source" TEXT /* Source of the temperature measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperatures_depth_level FOREIGN KEY ("depth_level") REFERENCES depths ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currents" (
  "current_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each current entry */,
  "depth_level" REAL /* Reference to the depth level */,
  "ewct" REAL /* East-West current in meters/second */,
  "nsct" REAL /* North-South current in meters/second */,
  "current_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the current measurement */,
  "current_source" TEXT /* Source of the current measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("current_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currents_depth_level FOREIGN KEY ("depth_level") REFERENCES depths ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winds" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind entry */,
  "depth_level" REAL /* Reference to the depth level */,
  "wspn_model" REAL /* Normal wind speed model reading */,
  "wspe_model" REAL /* Model wind speed reading */,
  "wind_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the wind measurement */,
  "wind_source" TEXT /* Source of the wind measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winds_depth_level FOREIGN KEY ("depth_level") REFERENCES depths ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_levels" (
  "stress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress entry */,
  "depth_level" REAL /* Reference to the depth level */,
  "wste_model" REAL /* Estimated water stress from the model */,
  "wstn_model" REAL /* Normal water stress reading */,
  "stress_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the stress measurement */,
  "stress_source" TEXT /* Source of the stress measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_levels_depth_level FOREIGN KEY ("depth_level") REFERENCES depths ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geographic coordinates */,
  "location_source" TEXT /* Source of the geographic coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES oceanographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
